task_completion.description: Locate and select Einstein's 1905 paper in the Zotero library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paper titled 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' is highlighted or selected in the main Zotero library list view.

task_completion.description: Update the publication field for Einstein's 1905 paper to its full title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero Info pane for the Einstein paper, the 'Publication' field displays exactly 'Annalen der Physik' instead of 'Ann. Phys.'.

task_completion.description: Update the publication field for McCarthy's 1960 paper to its full title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero Info pane for the McCarthy paper ('Recursive Functions...'), the 'Publication' field displays exactly 'Communications of the ACM' instead of 'Comm. ACM'.

task_completion.description: Update the publication field for Dijkstra's 1959 paper to its full title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero Info pane for the Dijkstra paper ('A Note on Two Problems...'), the 'Publication' field displays exactly 'Numerische Mathematik' instead of 'Numer. Math.'.

task_completion.description: Update the publication field for Shannon's 1948 paper to its full title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero Info pane for the Shannon paper ('A Mathematical Theory of Communication'), the 'Publication' field displays exactly 'Bell System Technical Journal' instead of 'Bell Syst. Tech. J.'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Zotero graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application window open and active, with edits happening in the Zotero Info pane, rather than terminal commands or SQLite database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually edited the fields within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the text cursor or focus highlight inside the 'Publication' text boxes in the Zotero Info pane during the trajectory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the real Zotero application and did not fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must match Zotero's standard three-pane layout (collections on left, item list in middle, info pane on right), not a text editor or a mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified facts for the VLM verifier:
- Einstein (1905) title: 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies', expected publication: 'Annalen der Physik'.
- McCarthy (1960) full title: 'Recursive Functions of Symbolic Expressions and Their Computation by Machine, Part I' (note: title in Zotero may be incomplete, but publication must be updated), expected publication: 'Communications of the ACM'.
- Dijkstra (1959) title: 'A Note on Two Problems in Connexion with Graphs' (note the authentic spelling 'Connexion'), expected publication: 'Numerische Mathematik'.
- Shannon (1948) title: 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication', expected publication: 'Bell System Technical Journal'.
